role: This file is the shared React component kit (design-system primitives) that regions compose into a consistent product-wide visual language.
capabilities: SectionHead: panel heading with optional uppercase kicker tag and right-aligned aside slot
LaneHead: grouped-lane header with tone tint, count badge, and optional collapsible toggle
Surface: tone-accented card/list row with optional click/interactive affordance and data-ui-ref forwarding
substance_why: All five documented primitives render real markup with token-driven classes and accept meaningful props.
interactions_present: LaneHead toggle button with caret indicator
Surface click handler and interactive affordance styling
interactions_missing: No keyboard/focus handling on Surface or LaneHead
No ARIA expanded/collapsed or disabled states on LaneHead
No semantic action treatment for SectionHead aside
No aria-label or live-region semantics on Badge
EmptyState has no recovery action or illustration slot
reuse_verdict_why: It is the token-only shared primitive library central to the redesign and already aligned with the one-language direction.
decomposition_hints: Split into per-primitive files (SectionHead, LaneHead, Badge, Surface, EmptyState) once the kit grows beyond these five
Extract tone tokens and class-name builders into a shared utilities file if more primitives are added
